name: @sail/root
description: Sail monorepo root for the proof-of-name registry and Minecraft identity gateway.

scripts.protocol:check: node tools/verify-protocol.mjs && pnpm api:check && pnpm version:check
scripts.check: pnpm structure:check && pnpm protocol:check && pnpm -r --if-present run check
scripts.test: pnpm structure:check && pnpm protocol:check && pnpm -r --if-present run test
